scripts.validate: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run build
scripts.payload:migrate: cross-env NODE_ENV=development PAYLOAD_CONFIG_PATH=payload.config.ts node --env-file=.env -r ./scripts/patch-next-env.cjs -r tsx/cjs node_modules/payload/dist/bin/index.js migrate
scripts.payload:migrate:create: cross-env NODE_ENV=development PAYLOAD_CONFIG_PATH=payload.config.ts node --env-file=.env -r ./scripts/patch-next-env.cjs -r tsx/cjs node_modules/payload/dist/bin/index.js migrate:create
scripts.payload:migrate:run: cross-env NODE_ENV=development PAYLOAD_CONFIG_PATH=payload.config.ts node --env-file=.env -r ./scripts/patch-next-env.cjs -r tsx/cjs scripts/run-migrations.ts
scripts.seed: cross-env NODE_ENV=development PAYLOAD_CONFIG_PATH=payload.config.ts node --env-file=.env -r ./scripts/patch-next-env.cjs -r tsx/cjs scripts/seed.ts
scripts.seed:blog: cross-env NODE_ENV=development PAYLOAD_CONFIG_PATH=payload.config.ts node --env-file=.env -r ./scripts/patch-next-env.cjs -r tsx/cjs scripts/seed-blog.ts
scripts.seed:en: cross-env NODE_ENV=development PAYLOAD_CONFIG_PATH=payload.config.ts node --env-file=.env -r ./scripts/patch-next-env.cjs -r tsx/cjs scripts/seed-en.ts
scripts.sync-admin: cross-env NODE_ENV=production PAYLOAD_SKIP_EMAIL_INIT=true PAYLOAD_CONFIG_PATH=payload.config.ts node --env-file=.env -r ./scripts/patch-next-env.cjs -r tsx/cjs scripts/sync-admin-from-env.ts
